In map-Reduce programming, What are map files and why are they important ?

Options.OptionText: Map files are files that show how the data is distributed in Hadoop cluster.
Map files are stored on the namenode and capture the metadata for all blocks on a particular tack . This how Hadoop is "rack aware".
Map files are sorted sequence files that also have an index. The index allows fase data look up.
Map files are generated by Map-reduce after reduce step. Tehy show the task distribution during job execution.
